commonsmetadata-desc: Waxay ballaarisaa hantida "extmetadata" ee module-ka API-ga macluumaadka sawirrada si loogu daro macluumaad ku kaydsan bogagga sharaxaadda sawirrada ee isticmaala tusmooyinka caadi ahaan laga isticmaalo Wikimedia Commons
commonsmetadata-trackingcategory-no-lice: Faylal aan lahayn shati la akhrin karo mashiinka
Faylku ma laha wax tusmo shati ah oo [{{MediaWiki:Commonsmetadata-doc-url}} la akhrin karo mashiinka].
commonsmetadata-trackingcategory-no-desc: Faylal aan lahayn sharaxaad la akhrin karo mashiinka
Faylku ma laha tusmo macluumaad oo [{{MediaWiki:Commonsmetadata-doc-url}} la akhrin karo mashiinka], ama qaybtiisa sharaxaadda lama buuxin.
commonsmetadata-trackingcategory-no-auth: Faylal aan lahayn qoraa la akhrin karo mashiinka
Faylku ma laha tusmo macluumaad oo [{{MediaWiki:Commonsmetadata-doc-url}} la akhrin karo mashiinka], ama qaybta qoraaga lama buuxin.
commonsmetadata-trackingcategory-no-sour: Faylal aan lahayn il la akhrin karo mashiinka
Faylku ma laha tusmo macluumaad oo [{{MediaWiki:Commonsmetadata-doc-url}} la akhrin karo mashiinka], ama qaybta isha lama buuxin.
commonsmetadata-trackingcategory-no-pate: Faylal aan lahayn shati ruqsad la akhrin karo mashiinka
Faylku ma laha tusmo shati ruqsad oo [{{MediaWiki:Commonsmetadata-doc-url}} la akhrin karo mashiinka].
